visual_description:
In a dimly lit, cluttered room, three men stand in a tense confrontation. The man in the center, with platinum blonde hair and a black coat, points a wand forward with an intense expression. To his left, another man with dark hair and a mustache, also in a black coat, mirrors the action, pointing his own wand. To the right, a third man in a dark suit and tie looks on. The background is filled with dark, ornate furniture and shelves packed with various objects, creating a chaotic and shadowy atmosphere. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner. The camera is steady, capturing the three men from the waist up. The audio opens with a tense, low-frequency hum that builds a sense of impending conflict. A man with a sharp, commanding voice shouts an order in Chinese, "Remove your weapons!" His tone is firm and demanding.

The camera angle shifts to a close-up of the three men. The man with platinum hair is now in the foreground, his face contorted in a shout as he points his wand. The other two men are visible behind him, also pointing their wands forward. Chinese text appears at the bottom of the screen. Immediately following, another
